'''Algarian''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Dufilvian sector/Legends|Dufilvian sector]]. It was raided by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which was attempting to defeat all [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] support on-planet.

Algarian was well known for its huge and complex governing bureaucracy. No other information was publicly available without submission of a [[Form AA-23-7022]] and a 150 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] processing fee to the [[Algarian Bureau of Planetary Information and Tourism]].

{{Planet-stub}}
